title: rubus × sterilis
intro: Rubus × sterilis, also known as the black raspberry or thimbleberry hybrid, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and thimbleberry (Rubus parviflorus) plants. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Rubus × sterilis include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and promote digestive health, as well as its potential to help manage blood sugar levels and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Rubus × sterilis can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or jam, and is also used as a natural remedy in various forms, including fresh or frozen fruit, juice, and supplements.
